subject: Vietnam footwear tariff rule published at 38%
claim_text: CBP published final rule imposing 38% tariff on Vietnamese footwear effective May 1.

subject: China electronics tariff investigation opened
claim_text: Section 301 investigation opened into Chinese semiconductor and electronics trade practices.

subject: Mexico auto tariff increase to 30% reported
claim_text: Sources report a planned increase to 30% on Mexican automobile parts imports.

subject: Vietnam textile tariff increase 28% announced
claim_text: Administration announced 28% tariff on Vietnamese textile and fabric imports, effective June 1.

subject: 25% tariff on Mexican auto parts under IEEPA
claim_text: White House confirmed 25% tariff on auto parts and vehicle components from Mexico under IEEPA authority.

subject: Mexico steel and aluminum tariff pause extended
claim_text: The USTR extended the tariff pause on Mexican steel and aluminum imports for 60 days.

subject: 45% tariff on Indian plastic and rubber imports
claim_text: Executive order signed placing 45% tariff on plastic and rubber chemical imports from India.
